properties.Test Case: Check what happens for picture-only pages. All Talking Book Tool functions should be disabled including Import Recording, unless there is an Image Description (JT: 6.1-6.3 have a minor glitch: turning on image descriptions make the Speak button look enabled, even though nothing has been typed and it doesn't actually work. It stays that way even if you close the image description. All is well if you just never activate image descriptions. I'm guessing JohnH would decide to just live with this.)
